reviews.name: Jennifer
reviews.text: Excellent teacher! I have taken several private lessons with him and have improved a lot. He is very patient and attentive to technical details. He explains every step very clearly and always gives me useful exercises to keep practicing on my own at home. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Alhareth
reviews.text: I’ve been dancing bachata for just over two years , and taking classes with Carlito and Nunu was honestly the turning point. My whole dance level upgraded within just a few classes. He’s super technical but makes it fun, takes his time with every detail, and teaches with a lot of love and passion. If you’re serious about bachata in Barcelona, he is the real deal plus his style is one of the best in the world :)

reviews.name: Maxi
reviews.text: We met at a Vivaldi workshop. Seeing the way you danced, the smile you wore while dancing with everyone, and the way you taught, I thought: that is the person I want to learn from. And if anyone asks, I feel and know that I wasn’t wrong. You are one of the best teachers I have ever known, and I hope to keep learning from you for a long time to come. I simply want to say thank you, Carlos, for the person you are and for being the great teacher I consider you to be. Not 5... 7 stars out of 5.

reviews.name: Jennifer
reviews.text: Excellent teacher! I have taken several private lessons with him and have improved a lot. He is very patient and attentive to technical details. He explains every step very clearly and always gives me useful exercises to keep practicing on my own at home. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Masa & Polina
reviews.text: Carlos and Nono represent the new generation of Bachata artists—driven, curious, and constantly evolving. They are committed learners, always pushing their understanding of technique, musicality, and teaching. With multiple Jack & Jill victories, they are undeniably one of the rising stars to watch.

reviews.name: Maxi
reviews.text: We met at a Vivaldi workshop. Seeing the way you danced, the smile you wore while dancing with everyone, and the way you taught, I thought: that is the person I want to learn from. And if anyone asks, I feel and know that I wasn’t wrong... Not 5... 7 stars out of 5.
